scripts.build: npm run build:dashboard-v2 && npm run build:landing-v2 && npm run build:driver-app
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend test && npm --prefix frontend-v2 test
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend-v2 install --include=dev && npm --prefix landing-v2 install --include=dev && npm --prefix driver-app install --include=dev
scripts.audit:all: npm --prefix backend audit && npm --prefix frontend-v2 audit && npm --prefix landing-v2 audit && npm --prefix driver-app audit
scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend-v2 install && npm --prefix landing-v2 install && npm --prefix driver-app install
